title: Random Drops Mod
description: When you break a block, the block will drop a random Item. Always
body:
# Random Drops Mod
When you break a Block, the Drop will now be random. That's it.

## Update Information
The old mod was completely redone. You can now open the Manager by pressing K to select how the mod has to work. The mod can now also be turned off by disabling mod status.

### Persistent Mode: 
Every block you break will get a linked item to it, break your first grass block and it drops Diamonds, then every grass block in this world will drop diamonds.

### Every Block Random Mode:
Every block you break will be randomized, so the first grass block you break drops diamonds, then the second can drop oak wood for example.

Thanks for over 25k downloads :=)


## Help
When you know how to fix this or have any Idea for this Mod or just want to help me improve the User Experience, then feel free to help me via Github for example.

### Forge Version
[https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Random-Drops-Mod/issues](https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Random-Drops-Mod/issues)
### Fabric Version
[https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Random-Drops-Fabric/issues](https://github.com/BaGaJa004/Random-Drops-Fabric/issues)

**Have Fun**
